seo.title: Ruby on Rails implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping Ruby on Rails projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist outlines the technical requirements for deploying a Rails 8 application to production, specifically focusing on Kamal deployment, Hotwire patterns, and the Solid suite for background processing.

items.title: Master Key Management
items.description: Verify RAILS_MASTER_KEY is present in the production environment and not committed to version control.

items.title: Force SSL
items.description: Set config.force_ssl = true in production.rb to ensure all traffic is encrypted and HSTS is enabled.

items.title: Canonical Host Redirection
items.description: Configure middleware or load balancer to redirect non-www to www (or vice versa) to prevent session fragmentation.

items.title: Logger Configuration
items.description: Set config.log_level to :info and use ActiveSupport::TaggedLogging to include request IDs in logs.

items.title: Secret Key Base
items.description: Ensure SECRET_KEY_BASE is generated uniquely for production to secure cookie-based sessions.

items.title: Connection Pool Sizing
items.description: Match the database pool size in database.yml to the sum of RAILS_MAX_THREADS and the concurrency level of background workers.

items.title: Solid Queue Configuration
items.description: Verify that config.active_job.queue_adapter is set to :solid_queue and the database has the required schema migrations.

items.title: Database Backups
items.description: Confirm automated daily snapshots and WAL-G or similar point-in-time recovery is active for the production database.

items.title: Prepared Statements
items.description: Disable prepared statements in database.yml if using a connection pooler like PgBouncer in transaction mode.

items.title: Solid Cache Setup
items.description: Verify config.cache_store is set to :solid_cache_store and the dedicated cache table is indexed.

items.title: Health Check Endpoint
items.description: Ensure the /up endpoint returns a 200 OK and is correctly referenced in the deploy.yml healthcheck section.

items.title: Registry Authentication
items.description: Verify KAMAL_REGISTRY_PASSWORD is set in the local .env file and the deployer has push access to the Docker registry.

items.title: Asset Precompilation
items.description: Confirm the Dockerfile includes 'RUN bundle exec rails assets:precompile' and all build arguments for CSS/JS are passed.

items.title: Multi-arch Builds
items.description: Configure buildx in deploy.yml if the deployment target architecture (e.g., ARM64) differs from the CI/CD runner.

items.title: Remote Environment Variables
items.description: Use the 'env: clear' and 'env: secret' blocks in deploy.yml to separate public config from sensitive credentials.

items.title: Rack Attack Implementation
items.description: Configure the rack-attack gem to throttle login attempts by IP and prevent brute-force attacks on /users/sign_in.

items.title: Content Security Policy (CSP)
items.description: Define a strict CSP in initializers/content_security_policy.rb to prevent XSS, specifically allowing Stimulus and Turbo origins.

items.title: Dependency Audit
items.description: Run 'bundle audit' and 'npm audit' to identify and patch known vulnerabilities in gems and node modules.

items.title: Permission Policy
items.description: Configure the Permissions-Policy header to disable unused browser features like camera, microphone, and geolocation.

items.title: Secure Cookies
items.description: Ensure config.ssl_options = { hsts: true, subdomains: true } is active to prevent session hijacking.

items.title: Error Tracking Integration
items.description: Install and verify an error reporting client (Sentry, Honeybadger, or AppSignal) for the production environment.

items.title: Log Aggregation
items.description: Verify that Docker logs are being forwarded to a centralized logging service for post-deployment analysis.

items.title: Uptime Monitoring
items.description: Configure an external service to ping the /up endpoint every 60 seconds and alert on failure.

items.title: Memory Usage Profiling
items.description: Set up jemalloc in the Dockerfile to reduce memory fragmentation and prevent OOM kills on small VPS instances.

items.title: Disk Space Alerts
items.description: Ensure monitoring is in place for the host machine's disk space, specifically for Docker image pruning and database growth.
